title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at ICICI Bank
jsonLd.description:
ICICI Bank invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Vijayawada location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About ICICI Bank:
ICICI Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICICI Bank!
